improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Try three free searches today."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Meet Gideon, the Claude-powered assistant built for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and a dedicated workspace to streamline your operations."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.png"><meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai/"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Your Claude-powered assistant for trade and business. Try three free searches, then unlock unlimited access.">
improvements.rationale: Search engines and social platforms rely on meta descriptions and OG tags for previews. A clear, benefit-driven meta description improves click-through rates from search results, while properly formatted Open Graph tags ensure professional, branded previews when shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, and other platforms—critical for a B2B audience of traders and professionals.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for your business operations. Try 3 free searches today."
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately introduces the product name and core function, building brand recognition. The subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, professional support) and ends with a clear, low-friction CTA that emphasizes the free trial without mentioning price, reducing hesitation for first-time visitors.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to become a member to continue. Membership starts at just US$2 per day, giving you unlimited access to Gideon's AI-powered trade and business support, voice chat, and your own members workspace. Choose annual billing and save 30 percent.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in the user journey—the transition from free trial to paid membership. By clearly explaining what happens next and immediately reinforcing the low entry price and value, it reduces uncertainty, builds trust, and encourages conversion at the paywall moment.
